title: psoralea bigelovii
intro: Psoralea bigelovii, also known as Bigelow's bird's-beak or bird's-beak, is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Psoralea bigelovii include its potential to improve skin health, boost the immune system, and support bone health. Herbal preparations of Psoralea bigelovii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including eczema and other skin issues.
